properties.name: grails.banner.art.display
properties.description: Whether to display the Grails banner art.

properties.name: grails.banner.art.file
properties.description: The file path on the classpath to the Grails banner art to display.

properties.name: grails.banner.versions.display
properties.description: Whether to display version information in the Grails banner.

properties.name: grails.banner.versions.include
properties.description: A list of optional versions to include in the banner.

properties.name: grails.banner.versions.exclude
properties.description: A list of versions to exclude from the banner.

properties.name: grails.banner.versions.order
properties.description: A sorted list of versions to put first in the banner versions.
